title: EN UN LAMDANG HONG IT NA

sections.label: Chorus
lines: “Tate aw” hong cih na Pasian tate,

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa tawh kinai theih na ding
A ang sung i khawl ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nung ciang i min bangci than ding
Tu’n ki thei nai lo hi
A mah i sun ding hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sihna a zo min thang Topa
